title: Karol G Creates Tropicoqueta-Themed Cocktail for Her TropiTour & More Uplifting Moments in Latin Music
summary: Plus, Shakira surpasses Taylor Swift on Spotify, and a star-studded telethon rallies aid for Venezuela.
body: From career milestones to new releases to major announcements and those little important moments,  Billboard  editors highlight  uplifting moments  in Latin music. Here’s what happened in the Latin music world this week. Karol G gives TropiTour fans a new way to toast Karol G is giving fans another way to step into the world of her Viajando Por El Mundo TropiTour. On Thursday (July 9), the Colombian superstar and 200 Copas by Casa Dragones unveiled the Chellita Sunrise as the official cocktail of the tour, designed as a sensory extension of its tropical, colorful energy. Inspired by the macaw — “a powerful symbol of Latin America’s cultural richness and the vibrant tropical bird featured in the tour’s logo,” says the press release — the drink will be featured in VIP lounges, select afterparties and Casa Dragones activations throughout the run. The launch also comes with the Chellita Challenge, a social media contest inviting U.S.-based fans of legal drinking age to recreate the cocktail and dedicate a toast to someone special for a chance to win tickets to the tour. Rooted in the same spirit as Karol’s corridos hit “200 Copas,” t…

title: GB's Hewett & Reid roar back to win seventh doubles title
summary: Great Britain's Gordon Reid and Alfie Hewett come from a set down against Gustavo Fernandez and Tokito Oda to win a seventh Wimbledon men's wheelchair doubles title.

title: Madonna Dances Toward History With 13th U.K. No. 1 Album for ‘Confessions II’
summary: Sienna Spiro also lands the biggest British debut of 2026 so far.
body: Madonna has done it again: the pop icon has claimed her 13th No. 1 on the Official U.K. Albums Chart with Confessions II. Related Will Madonna Win a Grammy (or Three) for ‘Confessions II’? Madonna’s ‘Confessions II’: All 16 Tracks Ranked Ariana Grande Drops 'American Horror Story' Season 13 Amid Touring Schedule The sequel to 2005’s Confessions on a Dancefloor storms to the top spot, marking Madonna’s first U.K. No. 1 LP since 2012’s MDNA and extending her reign as one of the most successful artists of all time on the chart. Madonna joins a prestigious group of artists who have reached the Official U.K. Albums Chart summit 13 or more times, alongside Robbie Williams (16), The Beatles (15), Taylor Swift (14), The Rolling Stones (14) and Elvis Presley (13). Sienna Spiro ‘s The Visitor lands at No. 2 and is the biggest debut album of the year by a British act. “What Sienna has accomplished already is nothing short of remarkable,” said Tom March , Capitol Music Group chairman & CEO. These global achievements are just the beginning and speak not only to Sienna’s undeniable talent, but to her exceptional artistry and the genuin…

title: Ariana Grande Drops ‘American Horror Story’ Season 13 Amid Touring Schedule
summary: The singer's Ryan Murphy reunion is on hold after her tour schedule conflicted with a change in the show's production dates.
body: Ariana Grande will not appear in the 13th season of American Horror Story after all, with her exit driven by a scheduling conflict with her ongoing Eternal Sunshine Tour , according to THR . Grande was announced as part of the AHS Season 13 cast on Halloween 2025, marking her first appearance on the Ryan Murphy anthology series and a reunion with the producer following her role on his 2015 series Scream Queens . But a recently released teaser for the season, subtitled 13 , did not feature her, with reports that a change to the show’s production schedule had created a direct conflict with her set tour dates. Grande did not shoot any scenes for the season. The timing lines up with a run of scheduling turbulence for the singer’s live show. AHS Season 13 began production in April, and Grande’s Eternal Sunshine Tour launched June 6 in Oakland. In late June, she rescheduled three of her own tour dates — moving a July 12 Brooklyn show to July 14 and shifting two Boston concerts from July 22 and 24 to July 23 and 26 — citing production issues on her end. The tour continues through stops in New York, Canada and Chicago before wrapping overseas. American Horror Story: 13 m…

title: Jay-Z’s Yankee Stadium Night One Setlist: Every Song Played at the First Show
summary: The star-studded affair included appearances by Beyoncé, Blue Ivy Carter, Nas, Alicia Keys and more.
body: On Friday (July 11), Jay-Z delivered the first night of his long-awaited three-night run at Yankee Stadium, and he did not disappoint. Billed as the Reasonable Doubt evening for his day-one fans, Hov dazzled the crowd, reimagining his landmark 1996 debut alongside a live band. He seamlessly wove classics like “Ain’t No N—a” into “Excuse Me Miss,” while also making the night a family affair. Beyoncé joined him to sing the hook on “Can’t Knock the Hustle,” and their eldest daughter, Blue Ivy Carter, took to the piano for a silky rendition of “Feelin’ It.” When Jay shifted into a more defiant gear, he stunned fans with a sharp new freestyle aimed at critics of his recent Target deal. But the night wasn’t all about proving a point. Leaning into nostalgia, he reunited with Memphis Bleek for “Coming of Age” and Jaz-O for “Bring It On.” Then, as if pulling guests out of thin air, Jay continued the surprises. Former rival Nas joined him for a mash-up of “Dead Presidents” and “New York State of Mind,” while Alicia Keys capped off one of the night’s biggest mom…

title: Taylor Swift & Travis Kelce Paid ‘Over $160,000’ for NYC Wedding Permit, Mayor Zohran Mamdani Says
summary: What did the couple have to pay to host their wedding in the thick of New York City?
body: We don’t know all the details of what went down inside Madison Square Garden during Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce ‘s July 3 wedding last week, but now we know how much they had to pay so they could host the event in the thick of New York City. During a press conference on Friday (July 10), NYC Mayor Zohran Mamdani was asked by a reporter whether Swift would be paying back the city for police overtime needed to support her wedding weekend events in Midtown Manhattan, and the politician confirmed that she already has. Related Taylor Swift & Travis Kelce Are Married Taylor Swift’s Wedding Doubles as a Once-in-a-Lifetime Concert From Paul McCartney & Stevie Nicks Here’s Everything We Know About Taylor Swift & Travis Kelce’s Wedding “Taylor Swift … has paid already the cost of the permit that was lodged, which was over $160,000 for that event and for the response to that event,” Mamdani told reporters. “That was a permit that was finalized, I think, in just the days before the event itself.” . @NYCMayor Mamdani on Taylor Swift paying New York City back for police overtime during her wedding: "Ta…

title: Insomniac to Stay Involved With Miami’s Club Space & Factory Town Venues After Legal Settlement
summary: The global dance music company has "amicably resolved" its lengthy legal battle with a trio of Miami club operators.
body: Insomniac Events has reached a settlement that will keep the global dance music company involved in two Miami venues following a protracted legal battle with a group of the city’s club operators. In a joint statement to Billboard on Friday (July 10), reps for Insomniac and business partners David Sinopoli , Davide Danese and Jose Gabriel Coloma Cano say they “have amicably resolved their dispute.” Insomniac, partially owned by Live Nation, previously worked with the trio of men to run Miami’s Club Space and Factory Town venues until a legal fight broke out two years ago. Related Insomniac Sues Miami Club Operators for Trying to ‘Bully’ Their Way Into Control of Factory Town Venue DJ Quik Says His Son 'Made a Mistake' Following Murder Conviction, Pleads With Fans to Stop Asking About It Naoshi Fujikura of Universal Music Japan on Japan's Unique Superfan Culture & Global Ambitions: Billboard Global Power Players Interview “Insomniac will continue to operate Club Space alongside David Sinopoli and maintain its commitment to Factory Town,” the reps say of the settlement. “Davide Danese and Coloma Cano will continue to operate Jolene, along with Davi…

title: Big & Rich’s John Rich Sworn In as USDA Special Envoy for American Landowners: ‘Let’s Get to Work’
summary: The post was made official during his swearing in at the Oval Office.
body: Country star John Rich has been officially sworn in as Special Envoy for American Landowners, according to a White House social media post Friday (July 10). The post shows the Big & Rich member being sworn in surrounded by his family and shaking hands with President Donald Trump in the Oval Office. 🇺🇸 @JohnRich has officially been sworn in as Special Envoy for American Landowners in the Oval Office! pic.twitter.com/ZoZ284KX7D — The White House (@WhiteHouse) July 10, 2026 Earlier Friday, Rich also posted heralding the ceremony: “Today, I’ll be sworn in as ‘Special Envoy for American Landowners’ by President Trump at the Oval. My family will be there with me! (My Dad bought his first new suit in 25 years). I greatly thank @realDonaldTrump for giving me the opportunity to fight for my fellow Americans.” Today, I'll be sworn in as "Special Envoy For American Landowners" by President Trump at The Oval. title: Benny Blanco Offers First Taste of Spanish-Language Album ‘Hermoso’ With ‘Joven y Salvaje,’ Featuring Bb trickz
summary: The Spanish rapper speaks of the carelessness that comes with being young on the new song.
body: Benny Blanco is giving Spanish-language music a beautiful new meaning with his next project. The producer, who is set to release his forthcoming album Hermoso (Gorgeous) on Aug. 14, is letting fans take a look at what it’s all about. On Friday (June 11), the artist released “Joven y Salvaje” (young and wild), a song he produced to accompany the vocals of Spanish rapper Bb trickz. Related Benny Blanco Recalls His Mom Telling Him He Should Marry Selena Gomez Back in 2019: ‘My Mom Planted the Seed’ Selena Gomez Posts Sweet 38th Birthday Tribute to Husband Benny Blanco: ‘I Love You With All My Heart’ Benny Blanco’s Mom Had to Hide in Her Bathroom During Scary Home Invasion Its rhythmic foundation relies on a simple, repeating melodic structure, paired with a house-inspired beat. Within the track, Trickz delivers verses that capture the rebelliousness and occasional recklessness of youth. “Young and wild/ I haven’t slept, and it’s a Tuesday/ A stoley is in the garage/ I smoke zaza; I’m on Mars,” the rapper says in Spanish.  The music video of the song was also released on YouTube. Directed by Jake Schreier, the clip shows the artist — who pre…

title: Drake Makes $1 Million Bet on Conor McGregor to Win UFC Fight: ‘The Mac Is Back’
summary: McGregor returns to the Octagon on Saturday night to take on Max Holloway at UFC 329.
body: Return of the Mac. Drake has wagered a $1 million bet on Conor McGregor to win in his return to the ring this weekend at UFC 329. Drake posted his betting slip on Instagram on Friday (July 10) featuring a seven-figure wager on Stake with the belief that McGregor will defeat Max Holloway in McGregor’s comeback to the octagon in Las Vegas on Saturday night (July 11). Related Drake Makes Surprise Appearance on Die-Hard OVO Fan’s TikTok Live: ‘I Got a Lot of Love for You’ Drake Is Hosting Apology Parties for Anyone Named Janice in Several Cities: ‘Look Out for My Invitation’ Drake Pays Tribute to Tay Keith After Producer’s Death: ‘Endless and Eternal Gratitude’ Drake’s $1 million wager would net him $1.85 million for a total of $2.85 million if McGregor wins the welterweight bout. As of press time, Conor McGregor is an underdog in the fight with +180 odds, according to FanDuel. McGregor and Drake have been friends for a decade now after the UFC fighter revealed they connected in 2016 and met at one of Drizzy’s Summer Sixteen Tour stops later that year. “I’m a big fan of Drake. I had a meeting with Jimmy…
